arts.ttl: £80m price tag placed on Tottenham star to scare off Man City and Real Madrid
arts.sum: Tottenham have placed an £80m price tag on star defender Pedro Porro as the North London club try to fend off interest from Man City and Real Madrid in the Spanish star. The right-back has been a big hit at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium since joining Spurs in 2023 from Sporting CP due to his […] The post £80m price tag placed on Tottenham star to scare off Man City and Real Madrid appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea wonderkid FROZEN OUT amid Real Madrid & Liverpool interest
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly informed highly-rated academy star Josh Acheampong that he won’t play for the club again until he signs a new contract. The 18-year-old is wanted by the likes of Real Madrid, Liverpool, Paris Saint-Germain and Newcastle United, and Chelsea are eager to tie him down to a long-term contract in order to ward off suitors from across Europe.

arts.ttl: Another Real Madrid star sets sights on Saudi Arabia switch
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Antonio Rüdiger has his sights set firmly on a move to the Saudi Pro League down the road. That’s according to Relevo, who have on Tuesday provided…

arts.ttl: Toni Kroos makes blunt Kylian Mbappe admission after retirement
arts.sum: Toni Kroos has revealed he did not think about Kylian Mbappe's move to Real Madrid as a reason to delay his retirement, insisting it was his decision alone to call time on his playing career. The former Germany international brought an end to a glittering career after the 2023/24 season, bowing out with a fifth Champions League title with Los Blancos (his sixth overall) before featuring for Germany at Euro 2024, exiting the tournament at the quarter-final stage.

arts.ttl: What does BVB mean on the Borussia Dortmund badge?
arts.sum: Tuesday 22 October brings us a repeat of the 2024 Champions League final as runners up Borussia Dortmund arrive in the Spanish capital to face perennial winners Real Madrid at the Santiago Bernabéu. Despite Real Madrid being favourites once again, Dortmund know that the pressure is on for them to perform.

arts.ttl: Man Utd OUTBID Real Madrid for Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: Manchester United will massively outbid Real Madrid in the race to sign Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies . Some positive discussions followed and Bayern decided to head into the new season with Davies on board despite the fact that the two parties are no closer to reaching an agreement.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham’s bonuses still to be paid: how much could Real Madrid owe?
arts.sum: On the team side, Madrid will owe more if they win titles such as LaLiga or the Champions League, or if they qualify for the latter over the next six years – the period covered by Bellingham’s contract, which runs until 2029. While the exact details of the variable clauses were not disclosed, an estimate can be made of what Madrid has paid and may still owe for the English midfielder.

arts.ttl: 'I've scored more than Kylian Mbappe this term - now I'm being backed to replace Mo Salah'
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt star Omar Marmoush is being linked with a move to the Premier League after making a blinding start to the season, scoring 10 goals in 10 matches

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Real Madrid-Borussia Dortmund: Luka Modric assist to earn minutes and fearsome front three
arts.sum: Real Madrid kick off a crucial week against Borussia Dortmund at the Santiago Bernabeu, with one eye on El Clasico coming this Saturday. A rematch of the Champions League final, both sides look somewhat different compared to their clash at Wembley, as Dortmund sport a new manager in Nuri Sahin, and no Mats Hummels or […] The post Predicted Teams Real Madrid-Borussia Dortmund: Luka Modric assist to earn minutes and fearsome front three appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Toni Kroos reveals how he told Carlo Ancelotti about his retirement
arts.sum: Real Madrid legend Toni Kroos has revealed that Carlo Ancelotti expected him to stay at the Bernabeu for at least another year, making it difficult to announce his retirement. Madrid cruised to last season's La Liga title and his last ever club match was the triumphant Champions League final against Borussia Dortmund.
